description: KEYWORD TEST: wrtn and blackbox — SSN keyword blocking verification

wrtn.details: Page loaded successfully with full UI (chat input, tabs, sidebar). SSN keyword text entered via: (1) clipboard paste — React state mismatch, Enter didn't submit. (2) Direct typing via automation — Enter didn't submit. (3) JS nativeInputValueSetter + dispatchEvent('input') — React state updated (VALUE_SET confirmed in console), but Enter keydown event still didn't trigger submission. (4) JS KeyboardEvent dispatch — returned true but no API call made. CONCLUSION: wrtn requires authenticated session (login) to submit chat prompts. The input field accepts text but submission is gated by auth. Console showed ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on analytics.tiktok.com and cdn-cgi/challenge resources (third-party, not affecting core functionality).
wrtn.verdict: CANNOT_TEST — login required for prompt submission. Page load works, APF keyword blocking cannot be verified without auth.

blackbox.details: Redirected to app.blackbox.ai. Page title shows 'BLACKBOX.AI' but content area is completely blank — no chat input, no UI elements, no interactive elements detected. Same behavior as #353 and #360. JavaScript rendering fails through MITM proxy. Cannot test keyword blocking on a blank page.
blackbox.verdict: STILL_BROKEN — JS rendering failure through MITM proxy persists

key_findings: wrtn.ai: Page loads fine, React state can be updated via JS, but prompt submission requires login/auth
blackbox.ai: Still blank page — JS rendering broken through MITM, same as #353/#360
Neither service could be keyword-tested in current state
